user.title: Set up Switch Control
user.description: Choose a name for this panel and how many independent switch inputs it should have.

data_description.switch_count: Each switch input controls its own set of output entities.

data_description.sensor_entity_id: The sensor whose state (on/off) will control the outputs.
data_description.output_entity_ids: The switch or light entities to control on a short press. Also used as the fallback for long press and double press when their specific output lists are empty.
data_description.long_press_action: What to do with the outputs when the button is held for 0.5 s or longer. Events are always fired regardless of this setting.
data_description.long_press_output_entity_ids: The switch or light entities to control on a long press or hold. Leave empty to use the press outputs.
data_description.dim_auto_threshold: When 'Dim auto' is selected, dim down if the current brightness is above this percentage, otherwise dim up.
data_description.double_press_action: What to do with the outputs when the button is pressed twice within 0.4 s. Events are always fired regardless of this setting.
data_description.double_press_output_entity_ids: The switch or light entities to control on a double press. Leave empty to use the press outputs.
data_description.press_actions: Automation actions to run each time the button is pressed (fires with the switch_control_button_pressed event).
data_description.released_actions: Automation actions to run each time the button is released (fires with the switch_control_button_released event).
data_description.double_press_actions: Automation actions to run when a double press is detected (fires with the switch_control_double_press event).
data_description.long_press_actions: Automation actions to run when a long press is detected after 0.5 s (fires with the switch_control_long_press event).
data_description.long_press_released_actions: Automation actions to run when the button is released after a long press (fires with the switch_control_long_press_released event).

error.sensor_not_found: The selected sensor entity was not found.
error.sensor_already_in_use: This sensor is already used by another switch.

abort.already_configured: This Switch Control is already configured.

init.title: Reconfigure Switch Control
init.description: Select the switch input you want to reconfigure.

data_description.sensor_entity_id: The sensor whose state (on/off) will control the outputs.
data_description.output_entity_ids: The switch or light entities to control on a short press. Also used as the fallback for long press and double press when their specific output lists are empty.
data_description.long_press_action: What to do with the outputs when the button is held for 0.5 s or longer. Events are always fired regardless of this setting.
data_description.long_press_output_entity_ids: The switch or light entities to control on a long press or hold. Leave empty to use the press outputs.
data_description.dim_auto_threshold: When 'Dim auto' is selected, dim down if the current brightness is above this percentage, otherwise dim up.
data_description.double_press_action: What to do with the outputs when the button is pressed twice within 0.4 s. Events are always fired regardless of this setting.
data_description.double_press_output_entity_ids: The switch or light entities to control on a double press. Leave empty to use the press outputs.
data_description.press_actions: Automation actions to run each time the button is pressed (fires with the switch_control_button_pressed event).
data_description.released_actions: Automation actions to run each time the button is released (fires with the switch_control_button_released event).
data_description.double_press_actions: Automation actions to run when a double press is detected (fires with the switch_control_double_press event).
data_description.long_press_actions: Automation actions to run when a long press is detected after 0.5 s (fires with the switch_control_long_press event).
data_description.long_press_released_actions: Automation actions to run when the button is released after a long press (fires with the switch_control_long_press_released event).

error.sensor_not_found: The selected sensor entity was not found.
error.sensor_already_in_use: This sensor is already used by another switch.

options.dim_auto: Dim auto (dim up or down based on current brightness)
